title: justicia coursii
intro: Justicia coursii, also known as the Blue Justicia, is a flowering plant species native to Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Justicia coursii include the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
